name: 28-year-old student
history: 28-year-old student. Returned from Egypt. Previously relied on parents for support and is now managing bills, finances, and health insurance independently for the first time. Brother remains financially dependent on parents.
intermediate_belief: I must handle everything on my own or I am a failure.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't manage my finances and health insurance, I am a burden.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of dealing with financial and insurance issues due to feeling overwhelmed.
situation: Received an insurance claim with an unexpected balance.
auto_thought: I don't deserve health insurance because I don't have a job.
behavior: Avoids making necessary phone calls and taking steps to resolve insurance issues.
